text.tspan: set_sec 512; // pad initial 512 bytes of section C

tspan.style: font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;font-weight:normal;font-stretch:normal;font-size:26.6667px;font-family:'Mona Sans Mono VF';-inkscape-font-specification:'Mona Sans Mono VF, Normal';font-variant-ligatures:normal;font-variant-caps:normal;font-variant-numeric:normal;font-variant-east-asian:normal;fill:#0000ff
